title: Clinical Description
description: A clinical description to inform development of computable phenotypes using real world health data.

metadata.description: Information on the provenance of clinical description.

phenotype_name.description: The name of the phenotype the clinical description is for.

version.description: The version number or identifier of this clinical profile document.

created_by.description: The name or identifier of the person/ tool.

created_date.description: The date this clinical profile was originally generated, formatted as YYYY-MM-DD.

last_edited_by.description: The name or identifier of person/ tool that most recently modified the description.

last_edited_date.description: The date this clinical profile was most recently modified, formatted as YYYY-MM-DD.

source_of_information.description: The references, literature, or data sources used to compile this clinical profile.

clinical_profile.description: The core clinical and epidemiological data.

introduction_synonyms.description: A high-level description of the condition, including commonly used synonyms in the medical literature and by medical professionals.

clinical_presentation_and_symptoms.description: A summary of the typical clinical presentation and associated symptoms.

assessment_diagnosis.description: An explanation of how patients are assessed and how the diagnosis is made.

therapeutic_plan_treatment.description: A description of the typical therapeutic or treatment plan.

complications_prognosis.description: A summary of common complications and the prognosis for patients.

disqualifiers.description: An explanation of disqualifiers and differential diagnoses considered by medical professionals.

epidemiology.description: A summary of the known epidemiology, including prevalence, risk factors, and comorbidities.
